Primary Endpoint(s): {"Primary Endpoint(s)": "To determine whether docetaxel therapy at the beginning of androgen-deprivation therapy (ADT) for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer would result in longer overall survival than that with ADT alone."}
Secondary Endpoint(s): {"Secondary Endpoint(s)": "The proportion of patients who had a decrease in the PSA level to less than 0.2 ng per milliliter at 12 months, and the median time to the development of castration-resistant prostate cancer (biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic)."}
